name: free-text-meetup-note
description: User-typed note after meeting someone at a meetup. Two people, one company (Stripe), a works_at relationship for Aisha, and an introduced_by hint via Marcus. No stage signal because nothing has been applied for.

input.text: Met Aisha Khan at the Postgres meetup. She's a staff engineer at Stripe, works on database internals. Got her email aisha@stripe.com. She offered to make an intro to her hiring manager Marcus.

relationships.sourceQuote: She's a staff engineer at Stripe

expected.summary: User met Aisha Khan (staff engineer at Stripe) at a Postgres meetup; she offered an intro to hiring manager Marcus.
